channel.title: sequences on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life
channel.description: Recent content in sequences on Christos Tsanikidis - CS, Math, Life

item.title: Learning by Generalizing and Exploring
item.description: When learning, the following principles can be very useful: generalizing what we learn, exploring the concept we learn, naming things. Generalizing-Exploring helps us learn more than what we are actually taught while naming help us recognize-apply what we learn in random occurances in our lives [1]. When we learn a new practical technique, the steps required to start incorporating it in our lives are: understand the technique/advice, make it a habit (the hard part).
